text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Scarlet, you've got some rice stuck to your
clothes.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: N-not so loud... I've got an image to protect!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, calm down, will ya? Just hurry up and clean
yourself up, Miss Smarty Pants.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
On the hem of your skirt. In the back. Do it now
while there's no one looking.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for—man, you're annoying. Just turn your
butt around. I'll grab it for you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Y-you don't have any sense of delicacy, do you?!
